enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Paruthi Edukayile expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Aattukara Alamelu?

The movie Aattukara Alamelu revolves around love and family dynamics, showcasing various emotional moments.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the renowned artist P. Susheela, known for her melodious voice in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Paruthi Edukayile was composed by Shankar Ganesh, a prominent music director in the industry.

When was this song released?

This beautiful melody was released in 1977, making it a cherished classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paruthi Edukayile, the lyrics convey a deep sense of longing and affection, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of love. The song plays a pivotal role in Aattukara Alamelu, enhancing the romantic moments between the characters. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by P. Susheela, it evokes nostalgia and warmth. This classic track remains a favorite for romantic occasions, reminding listeners of the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paruthi Edukayile is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia, beautifully rendered by the legendary P. Susheela. This enchanting song from the classic film Aattukara Alamelu resonates with emotions that transcend generations. Experience the magic of this soulful track that continues to evoke cherished memories.
stanzaMeanings: What have I seen for many days, my friend? (2)
If someone comes running, it won't be good, if someone comes running, it won't be good.
I have come running, I was only looking at you. (2)
I have come searching, I don't know what happened before. (2)
I have come running, I was only looking at you.
On the path of the one who is lost, I won't go. (2) Like a madman, I keep coming around and around. (2)
Coming around and around, the day has come, the day has come, the one who went away has returned, my heart is cool now, my heart is cool now, it is ready to unite.
What have I seen for many days, my friend?
If someone comes running, it won't be good. (2)
I have come running, I was only looking at you.
If they come to work for the union, they will look and laugh, they will talk nonsense.
They will come together and celebrate with laughter and joy.
By the grace of Lord Murugan, we will get married. (2)
What have I seen for many days, my friend?
If someone comes running, it won't be good.
I have come running, I was only looking at you.
I have come searching, I don't know what happened before. (2)
What have I seen for many days, my friend?
Many days have passed, my friend.
